scope: Bounded live verification of seeded KSH STADAT table codes against their published titles. No collector run, no MinIO.
method: Each code checked via https://www.ksh.hu/stadat_files/sza/en/<code>.html (title) and the .xlsx existence. Titles were taken from the canonical HTML preview.
key_finding: The three previous seeds were not stale but mislabelled; two of three were not rail. Corrected the seed set to six title-verified rail tables.

retired_seeds.actual_title: Inland waterway transport of goods by insignia of vessel
National road goods transport by sector classification of carrier and by customer
Rail goods transport by direction of traffic
retired_seeds.note: Real rail table but mislabelled as passenger; it is freight. Re-seeded as ksh_rail_freight.

confirmed_rail_tables.title: Rail goods transport by direction of traffic
confirmed_rail_tables.sample: 2024 grand total 45,708 thousand tonnes; tonne-km series present

confirmed_rail_tables.title: Interurban passenger transport by mode of transport
Road and rail network
confirmed_rail_tables.sample: 2024 standard-gauge railway 7,395 km; electrified line 3,367 km

confirmed_rail_tables.title: Length of railway lines by county and region
Narrow gauge railway lines
confirmed_rail_tables.sample: 2024 operated length 288 km; 1,209,478 passengers; 15,636 thousand passenger-km

result: 6/6 confirmed rail tables live (HTTP 200, real data). Parser re-seeded and now validates XLSX magic bytes so a wrong-but-200 response is rejected instead of landed.
